name: Fudgy Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar, milk, butter or margarine, and cocoa in a saucepan.
2. Bring the mixture to a full rolling boil over medium heat.
3. Boil for 1 minute after reaching a full boil.
4. Remove from heat and stir in salt and vanilla extract.
5. Add peanut butter and oats, blending well until all ingredients are incorporated.
6. Scoop the dough by teaspoonfuls onto waxed paper.
7. Allow to cool completely before serving or storing.
Makes 4 dozen
